title: Warning
content:
High in the heavens I saw the moon this morning,
         Albeit the sun shone bright;
    Unto my soul it spoke, in voice of warning,
         "Remember Night!"
meaning:
"Warning" is a quintessential example of Ella Wheeler Wilcox's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
